title: delphinium pilosulum
intro: Delphinium pilosulum, also known as the hairy larkspur, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and as a remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The hairy larkspur can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, offering a natural solution for those seeking alternative health remedies.
